question: In which year did the historical event "Fall of the Berlin Wall" take place in Germany?
funFact: The dismantling of the wall symbolized the collapse of the Iron Curtain and the reunification of East and West Germany.

question: In which year did the historical event "Unification of Germany" take place in Germany?
funFact: Bismarck used a series of strategic wars to unify independent German kingdoms under Prussian leadership.
